message: Node started: Solve the transcendental equation n = 1 / (1 + exp(-(mu - epsilon * z * n) / (k_B T))) for n. Use the following values: mu / (k_B T) = 0.1, epsilon / (k_B T) = -1 / (2 * pi), and z = 12. Substitute these into the equation to get n = 1 / (1 + exp(-(0.1 + (12 / (2 * pi)) * n))). Find the numerical value of n to four decimal places.
